message:
feat(btree,vdbe): replace MockBtreeCursor with real BtCursor for storage cursors; fix ZeroOrNull semantics

Promote MemPageStore from a test-only helper to a public module-level
struct with configurable page_size and convenience constructors
(::new, ::with_empty_table, ::init_leaf_table_root). This enables the
VDBE engine to exercise the real BtCursor page-level navigation code
path for OpenRead storage cursors instead of the MockBtreeCursor shim
that bypassed all B-tree logic.

The VDBE StorageCursor now builds a transient BtCursor<MemPageStore>
snapshot from MemTable rows, inserting each row through the real
table_insert path — ensuring page splits, overflow chains, and cell
encoding are all exercised identically to the production pager stack.

Also fix the ZeroOrNull opcode to match SQLite reference semantics:
if either P1 or P3 is NULL, set P2 to NULL; otherwise set P2 to 0.
The previous implementation incorrectly checked all three registers
and only ever set P2 to Integer(0).

Add two regression tests for SAVEPOINT RELEASE behavior:
- Verify RELEASE of an implicit savepoint ends the transaction
- Verify RELEASE after explicit BEGIN keeps the transaction open

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
